ground_truth.title: Video Game Reviews, Articles, Trailers and more - Metacritic
ground_truth.main_content: Metacritic game homepage featuring video game reviews, articles, trailers, and more. The site aggregates critic reviews and provides Metascores to help users understand how games were reviewed across multiple sources. Featured sections include new releases, top games, and various game categories.
with: Not every critic is the same. Metacritic offers aggregated game reviews from the top critics, and our own METASCORE pinpoints at a glance how each game was reviewed.
Video Game Reviews, Articles, Trailers and more
Featured games section with critic reviews and Metascores
New releases and upcoming game titles
Top rated games across multiple platforms
